case_title: DOUGHERTY, CHARLES M et al vs. HAWKINS, JOYCE et al

docket_entries.description: DEPT.#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. C/C FOR CT. TRIAL. PL.PRESENT W/ATTY. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/REST. PREMISES AT 2587 POST ST. - $3,258.15 R&D - $725 SEC. DEPOSIT CREDITED TOWARD BACK RENT - WRIT ISSUE IMMEDIATELY W/EVICTION STAYED TO 7-19-93 - RENT FROM 7-1-93 TO 7-19-93 PRORATED AT $38.33 A DAY - PMTS OF $250 MO ACCEPTED IF VACATES BY 7-19-93 W/PMTS STARTING 8-15-93 & ON THE 15TH OF EACH SUCCEEDING MO. - FULL AMT. DUE IF DOESN'T VACATE BY 7-19-93 - ATTY FEES & COSTS WVD.- NO STAYS - PL ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAWKINS, JOYCE DEMUS, WANDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2587 POST ST, S.F, CA. $3,258.15 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,258.15, STAYED UNTIL JUL-19-1993, $1,725 SECURITY DEPOSIT W/INT. TO BE APPLIED TO R&D OWED. NOFURTHER STAYS ON EVICTION. SEE FILE FOR DETAILS.
